candidates.note: Candidate only. Final implementation should use actual SRM portal evidence from recording.

candidates.label: Settlement Number
candidates.note: Prefer business label over generated DOM id. Do not hard-code real settlement numbers.

candidates.label: Query
candidates.note: Query completion must be verified by result evidence, not by click completion.
The row selector must be paired with status, amount, and invoice-eligibility evidence.

candidates.label: Generate SAP Estimated Invoice
candidates.note: Opening the invoice dialog is not final generation; final submit must stay approval-gated.

candidates.label: Invoice Date
candidates.note: Date values must be visible before final approval.

candidates.label: Posting Date
candidates.note: Do not silently default posting date from memory.

candidates.label: Base Date
candidates.note: Do not silently default base date from memory.

candidates.label: OK
candidates.note: Final irreversible invoice generation must be behind a human approval gate.
